indices.description: T+0: per-leg instantaneous β×ΔSPX (linear, no decay/borrow). 1M–12M: horizon-scaled equity shock (rms) + LETF decay/borrow. 12M-terminal row uses full labeled ΔSPX. Historical rows: daily SPX paths, path-realized vol, VIX-linked borrow stress.

vix_decay_matrix.description: Expected net book carry over the next 12 months at SPX 0%, with forecast vol adjusted by vol elasticity (v3 log-log), variance decomposition, optional spike-revert path integral, and VIX-stressed borrow on short legs.

bucket_sleeve_panel.return_denominator_note: ROC / ROG / ROM denominators = average per-day capital since 2026-02-27 (same as EOD email). ROC omitted when avg net capital is not positive.
bucket_sleeve_panel.exposure_note: Exposure gross/net = delta-normalized (β × notional). Deployed capital = signed MV on etf_screened_today (screener universe). B3 is a flow overlay. B4 uses pair-view gross/net (short underlying + inverse ETF legs); ratio-split net reconciles to the book total.

borrow_shock_panel.note: Annualized carry = Σ |short notional| × borrow APR on held short ETFs. Shocks are applied to every leg's current APR; incremental = shocked − current.

shared_underlying_panel.note: Shared broker spot lines are split across sleeves. B1 + B2 + B4 net (per bucket CSV) should match book net on the same underlying; Δ flags attribution drift vs net_exposure_by_underlying.csv.

movers_panel.note: Cumulative (YTD) PnL by underlying from pnl_by_underlying.csv.

display_sleeve_groups.label: Buckets 1, 2, 4, and 5
display_sleeve_groups.exposure_note: Share-notional book (B1+B2+B4 ratio split + B5 vol ETP); excludes B3 overlay.

display_sleeve_groups.label: Bucket 3
display_sleeve_groups.exposure_note: Delta-normalized flow hedge overlay (|β| × notional), not share gross.

capital_panel.return_denominator_note: ROC / ROG / ROM denominators = average per-day capital since 2026-02-27 (same as EOD email). ROC omitted when avg net capital is not positive.

weight_policy.description: Portfolio uses proposed_trades.csv rows with gross_target_usd > 0 only.
